overall.description: A stationary first-person view of a digital billboard cycling through advertisements in a cyberpunk urban alley from Cyberpunk 2077. The billboard displays alternating ads for 'MINDFUCK' and 'LIZZIES BAR' with glitch transitions, surrounded by industrial metal structures and neon-lit buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk alley with holographic advertisement billboard

events.description: billboard transitions from MINDFUCK advertisement to dark screen with glitch effects
billboard displays LIZZIES BAR neon text advertisement
billboard transitions to monochrome image of seated figure with dark background
billboard glitches and returns to full-color MINDFUCK advertisement

agents.ego_description: stationary observer watching the digital billboard advertisements cycle through different displays

entered.detail: large vertical holographic display showing cycling advertisements with purple and pink neon colors
rusted metal beams and corrugated panels forming the alley wall
metal catwalk or bridge structure with railings visible in the background
tall industrial building with multiple floors and illuminated windows
bright yellow metal railings along stairs or platform edge
small illuminated signs and advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a narrow cyberpunk alley, focused on a large digital billboard that cycles through advertisements. The billboard transitions from the colorful MINDFUCK ad to the dark LIZZIES BAR neon text, then to a monochrome figure display, surrounded by industrial metal structures and yellow safety railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk alley with holographic advertisement billboard

events.description: billboard glitches from MINDFUCK ad to dark transition state
billboard displays LIZZIES BAR advertisement with stylized neon text
billboard shows heavy digital glitch static interference before resetting
billboard returns to full MINDFUCK advertisement display

agents.ego_description: continues observing the cycling billboard advertisements in the stationary position

segments.scene_description: The second segment continues the advertisement cycle on the digital billboard, showing the same pattern of MINDFUCK to LIZZIES BAR transitions with prominent glitch effects. The industrial alley environment remains unchanged with consistent neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk alley with holographic advertisement billboard

events.description: billboard transitions from bright MINDFUCK display to dark monochrome figure
billboard shows LIZZIES BAR text with floating lip icon animation
billboard experiences heavy static glitch distortion
billboard stabilizes back to MINDFUCK advertisement with tagline

agents.ego_description: maintains stationary observation of the billboard as it completes another advertisement cycle

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the billboard completing another full cycle of advertisements, transitioning through the monochrome figure display and LIZZIES BAR text before glitching back to the MINDFUCK advertisement. The cyberpunk alley setting remains constant throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective in a narrow cyberpunk alley, focusing on a digital billboard that continuously cycles through a series of glitching advertisements. It begins with the billboard shifting from the vibrant colors of a MINDFUCK ad to the dark neon text of LIZZIES BAR and a monochrome figure, all framed by industrial metal structures and yellow safety railings. As the cycle repeats, the transitions become marked by prominent digital glitches that flicker across the screen while the surrounding neon lighting remains constant. The scene then follows the display through another full rotation of imagery, moving from the monochrome figure back to the LIZZIES BAR text before finally glitching back to the original MINDFUCK advertisement.
